Providers

Kairo works with multiple AI providers. Choose the one that fits your needs and budget.

O

OpenAI

GPT-4o, o-series, and more from OpenAI.

Available Models
gpt-4ogpt-4o-minio3o4-mini
Setup
1Get your API key from platform.openai.com
2$ kairo config set provider openai
3$ kairo config set api_key sk-...
A

Anthropic

Claude models from Anthropic for advanced reasoning.

Available Models
claude-sonnet-4claude-opus-4claude-haiku-4
Setup
1Get your API key from console.anthropic.com
2$ kairo config set provider anthropic
3$ kairo config set api_key sk-ant-...
G

Google

Gemini models from Google AI.

Available Models
gemini-2.5-progemini-2.5-flash
Setup
1Get your API key from aistudio.google.com
2$ kairo config set provider google
3$ kairo config set api_key AIza...
L

Local Models

Run models locally via Ollama or LM Studio.

Available Models
llama-3mistralcodellamaphi-4
Setup
1Install Ollama (ollama.ai) or LM Studio
2$ ollama pull llama3
3$ kairo config set provider local
4$ kairo config set model llama3

Switching Providers

You can switch providers at any time. Kairo will use the new provider for all subsequent commands. Previous conversations are preserved.

Kairo

Your AI teammate in the terminal.
